rule.name: color soft AU
rule.message: In Australian English, "colour" is often preferred.

rule.name: favorite soft AU
rule.message: In Australian English, "favourite" is often preferred.

rule.name: center soft AU
rule.message: In Australian English, "centre" is often preferred.

rule.name: organize soft AU
rule.message: In Australian English, "organise" is often preferred.

rule.name: realize soft AU
rule.message: In Australian English, "realise" is often preferred.

rule.name: traveled soft AU
rule.message: In Australian English, "travelled" is often preferred.

rule.name: canceled soft AU
rule.message: In Australian English, "cancelled" is often preferred.

rule.name: license soft AU
rule.message: In Australian English, "licence" is often preferred for the noun.

rule.name: tire soft AU
rule.message: In Australian English, "tyre" is preferred for vehicle wheels.

rule.name: favor soft AU
rule.message: In Australian English, "favour" is often preferred.
